name: Yeast Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. For best results, have all ingredients at room temperature.
2. Dissolve yeast in warm water and let stand for 5 minutes.
3. Place all dry ingredients in a mixing bowl and blend with the dough hook for approximately 2 minutes.
4. Add oil and blend at low speed for 2 minutes.
5. Gradually add 68°F water mixture at low speed for one minute.
6. Gradually add dissolved yeast and mix on low speed for 2 minutes.
7. Knead dough on medium speed until smooth and elastic, about 8 minutes.
8. Place dough in a warm area to rise for about 1 hour.
9. Punch down the dough.
10. Form rolls from the dough by pinching off 2 oz. pieces and shaping. Place rolls on lightly oiled sheet pans in rows of 10 down and 5 across.
11. Place in a warm area (90°F) until doubled in size, about 30-50 minutes.
12. Bake at 350°F for 18-20 minutes, or until lightly browned.
13. Brush lightly with melted butter.
